title: DEKTON 12" Builder's Level | Milled Edges for Enhanced Accuracy | Features 3 Vials (180° & 90°) | Durable Ridged Body for Extra Strength | Essential Tool for Precise Leveling and Alignment

description: From the manufacturer 12" BUILDERS LEVEL Portable & Lightweight: Made of strong aluminium which is lightweight and can be easily carried. 3 Angles Measurement: 180 degree Horizontal vial, 90 degree Vertical vial, and 45 degree vial. Milled edges for added accuracy. End protector caps for added protection. Finger grips for ease of carrying and storing. Ideal for use: Building/Construction, Carpentry, Renovations, Installations, Floor laying, Hanging pictures and photographs, Workshop, Garage and many more uses.
